summary: Comprehensive testing of Interactive Tutorial Sandbox feature completed. Backend APIs working correctly with 16/17 tests passing. Frontend tutorial flow fully functional with all UI components and interactions working as expected.

minor_bugs.issue: Test ordering issue - tutorial was finished in previous test causing subsequent advance to fail
minor_bugs.impact: Test logic issue, not functional bug

passed_tests: Tutorial status API returns correct structure (13 steps)
Tutorial guard blocks non-allowed APIs during tutorial
Tutorial advance flow through multiple steps
Tutorial lot creation with proper gating
Hidden lot visibility (tutorial lots not shown in public listings)
Tutorial skip functionality for optional steps
Frontend tutorial start modal appears after login
Tutorial card displays correct step information
